# Prohor Next.js Starter Kit

Prohor is a modern, reliable Next.js starter kit equipped with Supabase, Tailwind CSS, and Biome.
Developed by the Prohor Team, a group of dedicated developers.

## Content (English)
- Home: https://prohor-nextjs-starter-kit.vercel.app/en
- Login: https://prohor-nextjs-starter-kit.vercel.app/en/login

## Content (Bengali)
- হোম (Home): https://prohor-nextjs-starter-kit.vercel.app/bn
- লগইন (Login): https://prohor-nextjs-starter-kit.vercel.app/bn/login
